programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is reported missing after a fight with her husband. Police suspect a man who reported a fire in his car. Two tiny drops of blood are found in the interior. Finally, a tiny clue inside the suspect's watchband helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A retired police officer is found dead with a single gunshot wound to the head. His wife says the motive was robbery, but later tells police he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Washington, DC is plagued by a series of arson fires — each started with the same type of incendiary device — it's up to forensic scientists to find the clues that lay in the ashes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an off-duty policeman was shot dead, his fellow officers were determined to solve the crime. They needed clues to find the killer and they discovered them in tiny fibres and an asthma inhaler.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran slowed to a halt when the prime suspect had a solid alibi. But a lucky break led to a shady character who wore distinctive boots and had a sweet tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Create your sweetest space with HSN?s Natasha Lloyd - your go-to gal for all things warm & homey.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Joy revives the Middleton Exchange.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Joy's dream sends the three Merriwicks on a trip on a search for her father.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Wishes begin coming true in Middleton.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Cassie, Joy and Abigail delve into the images on Joy's vision board.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Cassie and Sam disagree about his return to work after his injury.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Strange things start happening to Cassie, Abigail and Joy's abilities.

programme.title: Midway to Love
programme.desc: When the network announces that her television therapy show is changing to a tabloid shock-fest, a caring psychologist returns to her hometown and reunites with her high school sweetheart. Stars Rachel Hendrix, Daniel Stine.

programme.title: Missing Pieces
programme.desc: A Colorado rancher uncovers a bed of lies and unanswered questions as he investigates his son's apparent suicide. Stars James Coburn. From the Hallmark Hall of Fame Collection.

programme.title: Summer of Dreams
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Fading pop star Debbie Taylor finds her way into teaching music to misfit kids.

programme.title: The Wedding March
programme.desc: After two decades apart, college sweethearts Olivia and Mick are reunited when Mick is booked as the singer at Olivia's wedding to another man. Stars Jack Wagner, Emily Tennant and Josie Bissett.

programme.title: Amor en verano
programme.desc: Maya Sulliway es una madre soltera que está estudiando para ser Contadora. Cuando su hija se va a un campamento de verano, Maya acepta una posición como pasante en una empresa de tecnología para adquirir créditos universitarios.

programme.title: El drama del día
programme.desc: Maggie deberá convencer a su ex-novio Darin, de que regrese al programa de televisión para que no sea cancelado ¡Él es actor favorito del momento! Protagonizada por Jen Lilley, Ryan Paevey y Linda Dano.

programme.title: Por siempre juntos
programme.desc: Durante mucho tiempo, Ellie Hemway a planeando minuciosamente la boda de su hermana. Cuando los huéspedes llegan a una playa paradisíaca, ella se encuentra con su exnovio, Greg, quien también es el padrino.

programme.title: Una Navidad feliz
programme.desc: Una joven autora de libros de autoayuda regresa a su ciudad natal durante las vacaciones de Navidad para promocionar su nuevo libro. Al ser rescatada por un extraño en un accidente casi mortal, descubre el verdadero significado de la Navidad y la familia.

programme.title: Confusión en el Mediterráneo (LAS)
programme.desc: Un cocinero se hace pasar por su hermano gemelo, que es Chef, para competir en un concurso culinario y se enamora de la mujer a cargo del evento. Protagonizada por Jeremy Jordan y Jessica Lowndes.

programme.title: Romance en Roma
programme.desc: Una actriz desconocida obtiene el papel de su vida en Roma. Junto a un periodista estadounidense que escribe un perfil, descubrirá sorpresas sobre el amor y la vida en la ciudad eterna. Protagonizan Italia Ricci, Peter Porte.

programme.title: De regreso a casa
programme.desc: Una coordinadora de eventos se hace pasar como su jefa y regresa a su rural ciudad natal. Con la ayuda de su familia y del hombre que dejó atrás, consigue el refugio perfecto, pero ¿descubrirá que su hogar es donde está su corazón?

programme.title: Compañeros de bodas
programme.desc: Nate y Brooke asistirán a las mismas cuatro bodas, cuatro fines de semana consecutivos. Para evitar citas a ciegas, deciden ir juntos como "compañeros de bodas" pero lo que comienza como una amistad, pronto se convierte en algo más grande.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, and Edna travel to New York to visit Frank's mother and attend a street festival; they are joined there by Lenny and Squiggy (who hitchhiked).

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne, Shirley, Frank, Edna, Lenny, and Squiggy continue their visit to New York, and Frank wants to win a trip to Italy for his mother by winning the Greased Pole competition.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: TV game show "Be Silly for Dollars" comes to Milwaukee. Len, Squig, and the girls are chosen as contestants. The boys are happy, winning a salami, but the girls perform zany stunts to win the grand prize from "The World of Luxury".

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne's new man Jake is exciting, but that excitement turns to danger when he forces her to help rob a store. Shaken up, she begs Shirley to help rid her of him. Jake won't have it, but can they get him to surrender to the police?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley takes a night school Medical Assistance class. Laverne joins her too. Professor Wilner makes learning tough for Laverne so she walks out, as he says she's unteachable. Will Shirley help Laverne bone up and pass the class?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: A bully that works with Lenny and Squiggy is always pushing them around. He gets them to set him up with Laverne, but he has only one thing on his mind. Will the guys step aside or stand up to him and save Laverne?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley befriends a German Shepard at the kennel when its abusive owner claims he's a mad dog. Finding out all unadopted and unclaimed dogs are killed, she and Laverne have a sit-in. Can their efforts save him and all the other dogs?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: The Fonz defends America's pride and saves Richie's hide when he matches blades with a French fencing champion, who not only insults the country, but makes nasty remarks about Joanie

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: During a week-end at Potsie's uncle's hunting cabin, Fonzie is accidentally shot in the vicinity of his favorite jeans' back pocket.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Struggling to write a school essay on America's immigrant history, Chachi is inspired by Fonzie's colorful story told to the tune of an imagined melting pot melody.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Grandma Nussbaum teaches Fonzie and Chachi a lesson in growing old gracefully when they try to convince the feisty granny to move into a retirement home.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Howard's teen-aged niece, K.C., comes to stay with the Cunninghams after a scandal closes her Houston boarding school while Fonzie hopes a night at the circus will help him win little Heather's heart when nothing else seems to work.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: After tricking Fonzie into going to a single's camp to help him get over losing steady girlfriend Ashley, Potsie, Chachi and Roger get suckered into a sauna by three con-girls.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Howard decides the house needs a second bathroom. Fonzie offers a way to have it installed and save Howard money as well.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie encounters trouble when she accepts a student teaching job at Patton High.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: His friends are baffled when Fonzie refuses to speak in his own defense after he is accused of manhandling a student and brought before the school board's disciplinary court.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Joanie tries to help an angry fifteen year old girl kick a drug habit that threatens to get her kicked out of school.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy goes to the hospital to have her tonsils removed, but a mix-up finds her being prepped for brain surgery.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: When Mork decides to join the air force, he unwittingly learns of the cover up of a radiation spill.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork haplessly gets involved with a group of white supremacists.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Nelson tries to further his political career by getting Mork the opportunity to try out to be a Denver Broncos cheerleader.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mork is overjoyed when Fred returns and announces that he's remarried, but for Mindy, it dredges up painful memories of her mother's death.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy
programme.desc: Mindy takes a job writing the Miss Lonely Hearts newspaper column and unknowingly encourages Jean to pursue a romantic relationship with Mork.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: As Shirley goes back for a grocery item, Laverne's at the checkout line, winning a shopping spree. Shirley feels jealous of her, but soon Laverne sees she's forgotten her friend. The two then team up for an all-out 5 minute, Supermarket Sweep.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Shirley and her brother think she's adopted as she doesn't resemble any Feeneys. Later at the hospital where Shirley was born the girls try to get the truth by accessing a private file room in disguise. Is Shirley not a true Feeney female?

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne shows Lenny a kindness and then gives him a kiss. Lenny now feels he loves her, and she's now his. No one can get through to him that this isn't the case, but Laverne hopes to let him down easy without completely breaking his heart.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: The pressure is on when a famous racehorse, Gallant Prince, is sent to Heartland to see if it can be rehabilitated after being terribly burned and injured in a highly published stable fire.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: A girl from Ty's troubled past gets a job at Briar Ridge and comes to Heartland looking for him. When Mrs. Bell goes to the hospital after a heart attack, Lou becomes attached to her pony, Sugarfoot.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Jack relents and allows Tim to visit Heartland, the simmering sibling rivalry between Amy and Lou heats to a boil.

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Heartland

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español: Día diez - Parte 2
programme.desc: Desde el menú hasta la decoración, los dos finalistas deben demostrar su talento al chef Ramsay, ya que cada uno está a cargo de sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El tiránico Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa por tercer verano para enseñar y torturar a posibles Chefs. El ganador recibirá un trabajo de Chef en el resort Green Valley Ranch de Nevada.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 5 of 5. As the weather dominator device is reassembled at Cobra's Temple, it's up to the Jor team's full-scale assault on the base to prevent the world from falling into Cobra's grasp!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra seizes control of the G.I. Joe space shuttle, using the shuttle and a series of relay cubes to create a pyramid-like “zone” no vehicle or machine can function in.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Shipwreck and Snake Eyes continue to evade capture in an effort to get back to the Joe team with vital data about Cobra's control cubes.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra commander activates the pyramid of darkness, stranding not only the JOES but also his comrades the crimson twins. Always prepared with a backup plan, Tomax and Xamot have other designs for the pyramid and Cobra.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Chaos ensues as the leaders of Cobra struggle for control of the pyramid of darkness. As Cobra forces battle each other, the Joe team is able to regain control of space station delta and launch a full-scale assault to try to destroy the Pyramid.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Zartan, disguised as a notable French scientist, infiltrates the worldwide defense center on a mission to destroy the facility for Cobra. He's planted a bomb, and now the clock is ticking… can the Joe team find and defuse the bomb before it's too late?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: In a diabolical plan to control the world's fuel supplies, Cobra begins detonating oil tankers and pipelines by remote. But when sparks uncovers the frequency Cobra is using to destroy the tankers, the Joe team may be able to turn the tables on them!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra plots to attack the cities of the world with lava flow when they kidnap Dr. Shakur and bring him to their jungle base, planning to use his breakthrough technology to harness the energy of Earth's core and cause volcanic eruptions.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra schemes to use the animals of the world against humanity with a mind-control signal enabling them to make any animal do their bidding, and the device causes Junkyard to turn on the Joes. Can they defeat Cobra and get Junkyard back to normal?

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Flint, Bazooka, and the others have to fight their way through a deadly Cobra temple to reach a group of brilliant scientists whom Cobra has kidnapped. As the Joes try to navigate the deadly maze, they find there is nothing fun about this funhouse!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is convinced that Cobra poses no threat to national security…he doesn't believe the terrorist organization even exists! he follows the Joes on a mission, determined to expose their battle as a massive government hoax.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra steals an experimental nitrogen rocket fuel. But before the Joes can capture the crimson guard in possession of the fuel, he hides it in a greenhouse, where the volatile mixture mutates everything into gigantic man-killing plants.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra threatens to use their latest weapon, the Ion attractor, to pull down the aurora borealis, melt the polar ice caps and flood the world. With every costal city in danger, the Joes head to the north pole to try to put a stop to it.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego y Peluzin empiezan un Boy Band, Gaspar se ve forzado a integrarse por problemas económicos. El Abuelo intenta comenzar una relación amorosa.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los del Barrio llegan a su edificio y se dan cuenta que está rodeado por un gran muro que les impide la entrada.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Isamu Kondo III, grandson of the leader of the Shinsengumi, hires Lupin and his gang to recover a golden cannon sunk by the Shogunate forces in the Tsugaru Strait. After much effort, the valuable golden cannon is finally recovered from the deep ocean.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Ellery Queen, the owner of the legendary sapphire called "The Eye of Solomon," is also the owner of a football team. Lupin, coming for the sapphire as announced, discovers Queen on the brink of death.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The 3rd Thieves Olympic is about to be held in Japan, and Lupin and Jigen are in it to win it! After winning the first and second Thieves Olympic, if they also win this year's getaway race, they'll become the first-ever Triple-Crown winners!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The world's largest diamond has been discovered in South Africa and Lupin has his eyes on the prize. But as it turns out, stealing it is the easy part!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko decides to marry Huffner for his jewelry collection, disregarding the rumor that Huffner's brides always die a mysterious death within a few weeks of their wedding. Turns out, he's also a collector of brides and likes them permanently preserved!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen receives a letter from Sister Angelica and heads to the African country of Borodias. Sister Angelica wants Jigen's help to rescue Dr. Othello, the leader of the country's independence movement.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO tries a different approach to capturing Lupin: Astrology. It enlists the help of Marianne, a clairvoyant who can read Lupin's actions using astrological predictions and her crystal ball.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko calls Lupin from Professor Pot's lab, but since Lupin is half-asleep, Jigen takes the call instead. Fujiko claims Professor Pot has accidentally invented a robot that manufactures diamonds, but Jigen doesn't believe a word she says and hangs up.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko has invited Lupin and company to a classical concert conducted by Kyoransky from the International Philharmonic. After they get a good look at Kyoransky's baton, studded with a a diamond worth at least 200 million yen.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin goes to prison intent on making Silver tell what he did with the loot, only to discover that a new top-of-the-line prison was built over the site where he hid the money. Will the operation to trade an execution for the recovery of the money succeed?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the Golden Bell, symbol of the monarchy of Beltenberg and precious tourist attraction. However, the bell that sparkles in the belfry is just a brass replica.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Zenigata is taken hostage from ICPO headquarters. The terrorists demand to swap him with their boss Napoleon XI, but ICPO refuses. Since Zenigata is no further use to them, the terrorists are bound to kill him; but Lupin is to the rescue?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Smith Gang hit-man company was once the best in the business, but they're suffering now from tough competition. Though the company chairman Smith considers running TV ads to revive his business, he can't think of a good way to do it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joe Spade was once a formidable hitman of renown and Jigen's sharpshooter coach, he now comes to beg for Jigen's help; he had gotten old, flubbed a hit contract, and is now on the run.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: ICPO Bureau Chief Jasmine is an able commissioner. She uses the governor to spur Zenigata into action, as she has a secret plan to arrest Lupin. But Jasmine's plan is to make this mission her very last at ICPO so she could get married.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Nightlight Mask murdered the Duke of Le Mond and stole his diamonds. ICPO is having trouble solving the case, so they induct mystery author Conan Dorill as a special inspector. Dorill deduces that the true identity of Nightlight Mask is Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a night of thunder and rain, a man gives Lupin a doll. The next day there is a news report that a diamond called the Phoenix's Tear had been stolen. Lupin's been caught on security cameras, but he has no recollection of having done the deed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin's target is the Vatican Crown, located at the North Pole. He devises a plan to thwart pesky Fujiko, which is to relocate penguins at the South Pole to the North Pole.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 9/23/88 - The Yankees headed to the bottom of the 9th down 4-3 to the Red Sox. Rickey Henderson helped orchestrate the tying run and give New York hope. Bases loaded and two outs, Claudell Washington scored the winning run on an error by Jody Reed.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/09/1988 -Dave Stewart, Rick Honeycutt and Dennis Eckersley combine to allow just one run on four hits against the Red Sox in an ALCS-clinching win for the A's.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/28/89: In the final World Series game at Candlestick Park, The Oakland A's complete a sweep of the "Bay Bridge Series" in 1989. Rickey Henderson sets the tone in Game 4 with a leadoff home run and the A's win 9-6 to take home a championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/12/90: Danny Jackson, Norm Charlton, and Randy Myers combined to throw a one-hit, one-run gem that helped the Reds clinch the National League pennant against the Pirates.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 5/1/91: In his third season with the Rangers, at the age of 44, Nolan Ryan took the mound against the Blue Jays and struck out sixteen batters in his path to the seventh no-hitter of his illustrious career.

programme.title: MST3K: Track Of The Moon Beast
programme.desc: In Track of the Moon Beast (1976), a mineralogist is hit by a meteor which causes him to transform into a lizard-monster.

programme.title: MST3K: The Beast Of Yucca Flats
programme.desc: After a devastating atomic test, Joseph Javorsky, a defecting Russian scientist, is transformed into a murderous radioactive beast. Can desert patrolmen Jim Archer and Joe Dobson stop the creature before it kills again?

programme.desc: The guys watch a post-apocalyptic film about aliens and robots, riff on two more installments of "Radar Men from the Moon", and try to understand surrealism.

programme.title: MST3K: Bride Of The Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo, who conduct heinous experiments on human victims in an effort to create a race of atomic super-beings.

programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Vadhir vuelve a la casa para anunciar más una cabina donde muchos confían que la pareja elegida es una luz segura.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Victor confronta los demás los acusando de falta de foco en el juego y nos les muestra su sensible o, quizás, miedo por su relación con Dianey. Los padrinos de cita eligen a dos personas improbables para una salida romántica.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: El mundo da vueltas: la fiesta termina con un final feliz para una pareja y para otra, termina con una gran decepción. Ahora es el turno de las mujeres para probar que son buenas estrategas. #girlpower

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Al final las mujeres no han logrado prender más con las luces que los hombres en la ceremonia y crece la presión para mandar parejas seguras a la cabina, encendiendo así viejas rivalidades. Y para avanzar, el truco es estar totalmente conectado.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La confianza en el amor y en la amistad son monedas valerosas en la casa pues también pueden ser puestas en juego. Los solteros ganadores de la prueba conocerán la rapidez de los jetski y también la velocidad de la honestidad

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La alberca de la casa se vuelve una arena de baloncesto, Eduardo cumple años y los misterios de la casa parecen estar emergiendo por todos lados para dejar a Quetzalli en una mala posición. Y una cabina más para descubrir.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Ya a más de la mitad de la temporada en la casa más hermosa de Trancoso, Bahia, los solteros reciben la noticia de que pueden irse a un salón de belleza a cambiarse el look y tal vez atraer nuevas miradas. El cambio puede afectar a algunas parejas.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: La fiesta finalmente termina con olvidos y crudas. Pero lo que Sharon no puede olvidar es que los actos traen consecuencias. Llega una nueva Ceremonia de Elección y ahora es el momento de poner en práctica y probar la estrategia de Andrés.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Mario no tarda en poner su plan en marcha para sacar a Quetzalli de la casa y sacrificarse por el equipo. Pero antes necesita convencer a todos y principalmente a Diana. Las cuerdas y los lazos afectivos se tensan en otra prueba electrizante.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Ya hace un año que Jessica conoció al hombre de sus sueños por mensajes. Sin embargo no ha conocido a Emilio en persona, ni ha aceptado hacer video llamadas y eso la lleva a desconfiar de su identidad.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Karen entró en contacto con Álvaro por una red social, pero cuando él le propuso dar el siguiente paso en la relación ella se negó y Álvaro terminó borrándola de su red de amistades. Hoy día Karen necesita la ayuda de Diego y Sebastián.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace ya dos años que Freddy mantiene una relación en línea, se contactaron por las redes sociales y a medida que se fueron conociendo, comenzó a florecer una relación de amor en línea.

programme.title: Catfish Colombia
programme.desc: Hace un año Diana conoció en una red social a Juan Manuel, sin embargo, nunca se han visto, ni han hablado por videollamadas. El día en el que se iban a conocer en persona, Juan Manuel tuvo un accidente de tránsito y perdió la vida.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto
programme.desc: Aunque se prendieron pocas luces en la últiuma Ceremonia de Elección, los solteros creen que han dado un gran paso para descubrir al menos uno de los matches perfectos. Mientras platican, los humores suben de tono por los famosos chismes.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on a penthouse listing where the owners have overspent; Steve hustles to sell his ex-girlfriend's apartment and her next-door neighbor's unit in record time; Ryan has to sell out a Brooklyn building for a first-time developer.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: John Colicos guest stars as a rebellious Caribbean government official, who plans to take over his country by having his president assassinated while in the United States to speak before a joint session of Congress

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: George Sanders guest stars, one of the world's largest dealers in illegal arms, who is about to complete a deal involving guerilla groups in North Africa and the Middle East in "The Merchant"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to free John Darcy, the leader of a liberation movement in West Africa, and end the tyrannical rule of his captor, Colonel Alex Kohler, a ruthless segregationist in the "Kitara"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Andrew Duggan guest stars as Justin Bainbridge, a multimillionaire paranoid militarist, whose son, Howard, defected behind the Iron Curtain with the formula to a lethal nerve gas he had developed in "A Ghost Story"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Hula-hoop expert Paul Tifford gives Mister Rogers some lessons. It takes a lot of practice to be able to use a hula-hoop well, and falling and getting up again are a part of learning!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits with Koko the gorilla, who has learned how to communicate in sign language. In Make-Believe, there's a gorilla, too, who seems scary until the neighbors get to know him. And there's a video of how people make play balls.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the eye doctor's office, Mister Rogers takes part in a general eye examination. The gorilla catches Lady Aberlin as she stumbles, which alarms Lady Elaine Fairchild. Lady Elaine is determined to catch the gorilla.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett brings someone who has great talent with yo-yos. Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make wooden yo-yos. Prince Tuesday plays well with the yo-yo, but King Friday does not. Therefore, the king outlaws yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Kiki and Kat were coworkers who fell in love. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to take their relationship to another level…and person!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Cece wants her boyfriend Leon to change his behavior toward her! Now, Lakeasha says Terrance has started controlling her every move and he constantly accuses her of cheating but she still plans to marry him next month!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Megan has been living with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. He doesn't allow her to go to school, get a job, eat when she wants, or even leave the house without his permission. Will Megan listen to her aunt and let Steve help her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Devil Dad
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can we redeem himself?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Terrazina’s own brother Tyson thinks that Simon is not the father. Will Tyson prove she cheated and that Simon is not the father of her daughter? Then, William is in a heated debate with two women over the paternity of their children!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: When Shalanda was 16 and pregnant, Cameron left her. Now, she and her mom want him to help raise their kid! James says he's had unprotected sex 500 times and is sterile since a childhood accident, but Kadee says he's the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Secret double lives. Family infidelity. Unknown fathers. This episode of Maury has it all!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Stephanie says that ever since she came home from work to find her 1-year-old with a black eye, she has feared that her children's babysitter harms them. Sitter Cheryl denies some serious accusations about a child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nye and her boyfriend spent last Easter with her family, but he spent most of it drinking and ignoring her until he left without a trace. Where was he that night? Plus, Jackie admitted to cheating on her boyfriend, but he believes there was more!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Avonte was diagnosed with cancer that had him hospitalized for almost a year. His aunt, Terceira, started a fundraiser to help. But now Avonte and his mother are saying that they never received any money and they believe that Terceira kept it.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shawn proposed to Nicole after she said she was carrying his baby but refused to show him any proof and then claimed a miscarriage. Next, Kamesha believed Derrick was the one but began to doubt his fidelity. Will these couples make it to the altar?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dan is here today to beg Heather to give him another chance. Next Ginny wants Tim back and says that he still calls her. Later Shenidia is furious that another women is trying to steal her boyfriend of 4 years, Gary.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desmond cree que su ex, Cassandra, está inventando todo un cuento de que él ha tocado a su hijo porque está celosa de su nueva prometida. Después, Tammy ha sido investigada por abuso infantil e incluso acusada de encerrar a sus hijos en un armario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Russell quiere volver a reunir a su familia luego de que sus 3 hijos murieron en un incendio. Después, Tatiana cree que su sobrino de 2 años sufrió abusos. Además, acusa al ex-prometido de su hermana, Chris. Chris dice que no es un abusador.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Curtis se sentó con su madre Telisha, y le dijo que está tratando de tener un bebé, pero Telisha se horrorizó y se preocupó porque Curtis apenas tiene 13 años. Curtis asegura que está listo para ser padre.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kelsey dice que su marido la maltrata. Malcolm cree que Kelsey le ha sido infiel desde el principio y que sus dos hijos pueden ser de otro hombre. Además, el novio de Carrie, Chris, cree que su hijo es de su ex.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Monique quiere probar que Chris la atacó cuando la llevó a casa después de una fiesta. Chris niega haber hecho algo malo y dice que Monique estaba demasiado borracha como para ser consciente de lo que pasó.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Devon entró en coma y está conectado a un sistema de soporte vital. Antes de caer en coma, le dijo a su madre que su ex, Alisha, le dijo que no era el padre de su hijo. Alisha niega haber dicho esto y siente que toda su familia le ha dado la espalda.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Bambi nos da una rara y honesta perspectiva de su ultra exclusivo estilo de vida en Los Ángeles. Tiffany se enfrenta a C.T. por un feo negocio.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: No hay peor momento para pelearse con la familia que durante las vacaciones. ¡Nuestros viejos amigos Donna y su marido infiel Richard nos acompañan en festividades!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jerry tiene 58 años y ha pasado por tres cambios importantes. Actualmente está felizmente comprometido con una mujer que se llama Joy y habla de su pasada confusión en cuanto al género.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Amigos y familiares se niegan a aceptar el matrimonio entre personas del mismo sexo! Martín no quiere que su hijo se case con su novio. Abril quiere recuperar a su ex, ¡pero está enamorado de un hombre! ¿Quién tiene la última palabra?

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chrishon niega estar comprometido con Taiwana a tres semanas de su boda. ¡Lauren se enfrenta a su ex por dejarla por otra mujer mientras está embarazada! Dave todavía quiere que Leesa lo ame.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Chloe y Dan se casarán pronto, pero finalmente está lista para contarle a él en qué trabaja de verdad. Entonces la madre de Amanda le ruega que renuncie a su trabajo.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Torrance admite haber sido infiel a su novia con un giro sorprendente. Entonces, Heather quiere que Tramisha, el ex de su novio, deje de interferir en su relación.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Harta del maltrato en su relación, Carla le dice a su novio que es infiel con su compañero de cuarto. Luego, Jay quiere decirle a Nikki que ella se acostó con su amante Crystal.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando Fidela habla con Luis Mario y le cuenta la historia de su hija, ella se da cuenta que se trata del padre de Angeliquita. Mayrita trata de tranquilizar a Teobaldito.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio le exige a Mercedes que no vuelva a su casa pero Rosaura se le enfrenta y le dice que ella se marchará con su familia para siempre.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se sorprende muchísimo cuando Fidela le dice que dios hará el milagro de salvar a su hija. Patricio se niega a cenar y cuando Camelia le pregunta dice que no sabe nada de Sonia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En la clínica todos están consternados por el accidente de Caridad. Al rato llega Luis Mario y Bruno, quienes cuentan que Caridad tenía algo muy importante que decirle.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella y Eduarda celebran la noticia que Silvano y Rosaura se van a casar, ya que de esta manera Rosaura se irá de la vida de Luis Mario. Mientras tanto Doña Cruz trata de reprender a los niños.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura entra a la habitación de la clínica donde está Angeliquita y le pregunta a la enfermera que dijeron los médicos y ella le responde que la niña se está recuperando satisfactoriamente.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luisana encuentra a Eduarda y le pregunta porque esta ahí con Caridad. Eduarda disimulando su plan le dice que está visitándola por la salud de Caridad y que ella la quiere como una nana.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad le va a contar todo a Luis Mario pero en ese momento llega la enfermera y le dice a Luis Mario que Caridad se encuentra muy mal y que por el momento no puede hablar porque se agita mucho.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricio, acompañado de Camelia, se encuentra con Luis Mario y Marybella en la borda de un barco. Allí Patricio aprovecha la oportunidad de descargar su ira tocando el punto débil de Luis Mario.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Tras ser persuadida por Santiago y Panchita para volver con Willie, a Mariana le sorprende encontrar a Willy con Margot juntos, él no se hace responsable y lo asume todo como un juego.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy desahoga toda su frustración en Santiago y Panchita al enterarse de los artífices de su matrimonio. Luciano se transforma en confidente y protector de Ricardo confiándole a Juliana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy fuerza a Mariana a estar presente en su fiesta, basado en su derecho a demandarla por no cumplir con las cláusulas de su contrato de matrimonio. Mariana en silencio piensa en su padre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: En la hacienda de Luciano, Mariana decidió dejar a Willy de una vez por todas, es perseguida por él con la intención de no dejarla, al punto de vivir en su humilde hacienda con ella.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Marybella visita a Luis Mario en su trabajo. Él le recuerda lo que le dijo en la noche. Silvano le lleva a Rosaura la prensa, donde aparecen las fotos del escándalo de la fiesta.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle begins for possession of the Baratie, with Zeff leading the cooks against Krieg’s pirates. Luffy and crew join the fray, but things aren’t looking too good!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji recalls his childhood as an apprentice chef aboard a ship attacked by Red Foot Zeff! When the young Sanji found himself overboard, it was the fearsome captain himself who jumped to the rescue.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the battle for Baratie rages on, Luffy is forced to take a drastic course of action, and Ghin debates where his loyalties lie.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The scoundrel Don Krieg appears to have the upper hand in his fight with Luffy. To avoid walking the plank, the rubber man must try a different strategy.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The standoff between Luffy and Don Krieg takes a turn in favor of the Straw Hats when their captain focuses his onslaught on his opponent’s weaponry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With Don Krieg defeated, Luffy tries to convince Sanji to join up with the Straw Hats. The skilled cook is interested, but he has something to prove before moving on.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With their culinary concerns in good hands, the Straw Hats set off in search of Nami – who’s on a collision course with a deadly foe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is captured by Fishman Arlong and learns a shocking secret about Nami. Unable to believe his ears, he puts the navigator to the ultimate test.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew make their way towards Arlong Park and a showdown with its fishy proprietor. Along the way, they discover a treasure map that raises more questions about Nami.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A fierce argument over where Nami’s loyalties lie divides the Straw Hat Pirates and only one thing’s for sure – no one is willing to risk their life for a traitor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami’s adopted sister, Nojiko arrives to fill in some details about the skilled mapmaker’s younger days.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nojiko continues the story of Nami’s younger days. Back in the present, Nami gets agonizingly close to a long time goal, but betrayal looms on the horizon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nezumi comes to confiscate Nami’s treasure, but who’s he working for? More importantly, who’s Nami working for, and what’s she gonna do with her booty?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats’ faith in Nami is restored, and now it’s time for a battle royal! Luffy and the gang are determined to make Arlong pay for mistreating their friend.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats and Arlong’s fishermen are locked in a swashbuckling slugfest, but things take a bad turn when Luffy gets trapped beneath the waves.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his friends work to free the captain of the Straw Hats, cowardly Usopp finds himself in a position to shed his yellow streak and make his father proud.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami must decide between letting Arlong maintain his hold over her, or joining the Straw Hats and leading the oppressed villagers against the tyrant Fishman.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Arlong better watch his back-fins, because Captain Luffy knows about all the horrible things he did to Nami – and it makes his blood boil.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: You have to climb and follow paths that don't always appear on maps in order to discover one of the best-kept secrets of the dynasties of pharaohs which was long hidden in the sand.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Part-time janitors Mike and Armando hope to clean up at an auction in Emery Village. Rick and Cindy don't want more newbies but Paul is always looking out to replace Bogart. Roy can't handle the tooth but Ursula's locker is totally tubular.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Buying partnerships are tested at an auction in Brampton. Bogart puts Paul on a diet. Meanwhile, Rick squirms when Cindy wants him to wear a spiffy new shirt. Ursula tries on her bossy-pants, but what Roy finds really puts the icing on the cake.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart declare storage war on the veterans at an auction in Orillia. Roy bums a ride off them instead. Ursula has a bad hair day, and Rick and Cindy meet former Stanley Cup Champion Nick Kypreos.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy is up to his usual antics at an auction in the Old Weston neighborhood of Toronto but this time Ursula strikes back. Paul and Bogart are the epitome of the blind leading the blind, while Rick and Cindy's locker is more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart concoct an entirely new strategy for an auction in Leaside: to have no strategy at all. Rick and Cindy play doctor, Ursula gets her geek on, and Roy rocks out with Canadian metal icon Robb Reiner.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Charles' house is filled with thousands of the nude paintings he has done.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Shanna owns the worst hoard in “Hoarders” history — a house crammed floor to ceiling with bottles filled with human waste.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: Van Helsing

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Mohamad tries to stay alive and catch up to the survivors who are following Axel to his former military base, only to find the site abandoned.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Trapped in an underground lab called 'The Farm,' the group encounters a feral vampire and deadly radiation while Mohamad makes a friend on the road.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Two years later, things have gotten worse: Warren's apocalyptic dreams continue while the group fights MAD-Zs.
